label: standard_plan_artifact
requirement: Build a persisted plan artifact for a routine implementation task
operator_goal: confirm routine governed workflow still produces approved plan and execution provenance
runtime_expectation: local mock-safe execution with linked run artifact

label: followup_checklist_recovery
requirement: Build plan with followup checklist and recovery guidance
operator_goal: confirm follow-up work carries next-step and recovery guidance

label: high_risk_auth_migration
requirement: Implement auth migration across multiple services with security review
operator_goal: confirm high-risk work remains review-gated and explainable
runtime_expectation: records provider/runtime selection without claiming bridge ownership

label: parallel_validation_modules
requirement: Coordinate parallel independent validation tasks across multiple modules
operator_goal: confirm topology and task visibility stay useful for parallel work
runtime_expectation: records runtime evidence as local artifacts

label: cli_workflow_hardening
requirement: Harden CLI setup summary for release readiness and validate the operator workflow evidence path
operator_goal: confirm CLI readiness evidence and operator commands stay understandable
runtime_expectation: setup and release-readiness records remain local

label: ui_operator_console_flow
requirement: Validate a read-only operator console workflow with workspace status, evidence, and recovery summaries
operator_goal: confirm UI-facing summaries can be explained from control-plane artifacts
runtime_expectation: UI consumes read-only JSON summaries without mutation

label: compliance_blocking_recovery
requirement: Recover from a compliance blocking condition after process docs and changed-file checks drift
operator_goal: confirm compliance blockers appear as recoverable evidence rather than hidden failure
runtime_expectation: compliance remains a control-plane gate before execution

label: runtime_fidelity_inspection
requirement: Inspect runtime fidelity for a local command-runtime job and explain attachability, receipts, and degraded reasons
operator_goal: confirm provider session snapshots and operation receipts stay inspectable
runtime_expectation: records fidelity without persistent provider session ownership

label: interrupted_task_resume
requirement: Resume an interrupted long-running local implementation task from recovery recommendation and run ledger evidence
operator_goal: confirm interrupted work can be resumed from external artifacts
runtime_expectation: resume guidance is recommendation-only and stays gated by approved execution
